issue_title: Draw removes boxZoom but never restores it on removal
issue_body_preview:
During setup Draw removes boxZoom (to be able to provide shift-box-selections instead):

https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-gl-draw/blob/78fddb17520f2869902b2e6dbf93c1bf888cf421/src/setup.js#L39

But when draw is removed it never tries to enable it again.
test_description_zh: 在地图上添加 mapbox-gl-draw 插件，然后移除该插件，之后尝试使用 Shift+鼠标拖拽进行 boxZoom（框选缩放）操作，观察地图是否能正常响应 boxZoom 交互。
expected_result_zh: 移除 mapbox-gl-draw 插件后，地图的 boxZoom 功能应恢复正常，用户按住 Shift 键并拖拽鼠标时，地图应出现缩放框并正确缩放到所选区域。
